questions.question: Define Stack Operations and explain the order in which they are performed. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Order of operations: Push, Pop, Peek, isEmpty

questions.question: Write a C++ program to implement a stack using an array and provide functions for stack operations like push, pop, peek, and isEmpty. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use a fixed size array and provide a function to check if the stack is empty

questions.question: Explain how a stack can be used in a real-life scenario, such as parsing the expression '3+4*2' using the 'PEMDAS' rule. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use a stack to store operators and operands
